seoTitle: How to Sell Your Online Course on Gumroad
metaDescription: Create and sell an online course on Gumroad by uploading lessons, setting pricing, and publishing your course product to start earning.
intro: Gumroad handles the upload, delivery, and payment side of selling an online course, so you can focus on the content instead of building separate hosting infrastructure. This guide covers creating a course product, uploading your lesson materials, and setting pricing before publishing.

steps.heading: Create a new course product
steps.body: Start a new product listing in Gumroad specifically structured as a course rather than a single downloadable file.

steps.heading: Upload course content
steps.body: Add your videos, PDFs, and other course materials to the product.

steps.heading: Set pricing and product details
steps.body: Decide on your course price and fill in the product description that will appear to potential students.

steps.heading: Publish and promote your course
steps.body: Publish the finished product listing and begin promoting it to attract enrollments.

faq.question: Can I upload multiple lesson files for one course on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add multiple videos, PDFs, and other materials to a single course product listing.

faq.question: How does Gumroad handle payment for course sales?
faq.answer: Gumroad processes checkout and payment directly, then deposits your earnings according to your configured payout settings.

faq.question: Can I offer different pricing tiers for my course?
faq.answer: Gumroad supports setting pricing and payment options per product, so check the pricing configuration during setup for tiered options.

faq.question: Do students get instant access after purchase?
faq.answer: Yes, once payment completes, students typically get immediate access to the uploaded course content.
